evaluator: mental dry-run against refined SKILL.md + references; no subagent or live render available locally
limitations: plantuml CLI not installed locally — render-correctness assertions remain static-only
single-shot mental dry-run, not 3× subagent variance
model adherence to VERIFY step 1 (run scripts/lint.py) is assumed; whether a real session actually invokes the script depends on model behavior

summary.delta_vs_baseline: +1 pass (case 9: FAIL → PASS); 0 regressions; case 6 still PARTIAL (untargeted by this refinement)

results.notes: Refinement didn't alter elicitation behavior. 00-elicitation.md still routes 'draw a diagram of our system' to ASK-all-three.

assertions.text: Skill does NOT emit a .puml code block on first turn
Skill asks at most one round of clarifying questions or uses propose-and-go
Candidate diagram types proposed are trimmed to 2–3
Elicitation question includes scope or participants, not just type

results.delta: unchanged + lint.py mechanical pass available; model may now optionally use `return` shorthand on activated calls (commented example in template)

assertions.text: !theme plain is the first non-comment directive
All three participants declared explicitly with type keyword

results.delta: improved: output now uses SHOW_LEGEND() instead of legacy LAYOUT_WITH_LEGEND() (templates updated). Tag system available for emphasis if asked.

assertions.evidence: lint.py E011 would catch any regression
lint.py W050 would catch missing tech label

assertions.text: Stripe and SendGrid declared with System_Ext
Routed to C4 container — no level mixing

results.delta: unchanged + lint.py E030 backstop on missing [*]

assertions.text: Every transition has a label after colon

results.delta: unchanged + lint.py E040/W041 backstops on class-arrow-in-ER and missing crow's-foot

unchanged — refinement did not target this gap. The user explicitly asks for 'public REST and gRPC interfaces' but the component.puml template still keeps interfaces commented out as optional, so model adherence to 11-component.md's 'interfaces required' rule is the only thing forcing them. Follow-up candidate: uncomment one interface line in component.puml as the default.

assertions.evidence: template default omits; depends on model reading the explicit 'show the public REST and gRPC interfaces' ask

assertions.text: Components grouped via package or node

results.delta: unchanged + lint.py W020 catches 28-participant sequence if model produces it anyway

assertions.text: Skill pushes back or proposes decomposition
Proposes ER and proceeds OR asks once

results.delta: FAIL → PASS. Refinement #2 directly targets this: 92-not-plantuml.md enumerates 'embed-in-markdown' as Exit Case 1, with explicit phrasing. 01-routing.md now consults 92 first.

assertions.text: Stops OR offers both with trade-off called out
assertions.evidence: 92-not-plantuml.md § 'How to phrase the exit' prescribes a 3-sentence diagnosis+recommendation+offer

assertions.text: Does NOT silently produce PlantUML as if request were ordinary
assertions.evidence: 01-routing.md now routes to 92 BEFORE the decision tree

improvements_not_captured_by_assertions: C4 templates now use SHOW_LEGEND() — modernized output, more flexible if user later wants to filter legend entries with tags
Sequence rules now document `return` shorthand and `autonumber` format strings — diagrams using these features are more idiomatic when activations are present
lint.py provides mechanical backstops for E001–E004, E010–E011, E030, E040, E051–E052, W003, W020–W022, W031, W041, W050, W060, W070, W080 — many of which the model might miss in a long generation

C4 tag system (AddElementTag) documented as canonical replacement for color-only semantics inside C4 — gives the right answer to 'highlight the legacy/hot-path/deprecated containers' instead of falling back to ad-hoc colors
follow_up_candidates: Case 6 — uncomment one interface declaration in component.puml so the template default surfaces interfaces. Currently they're documented but the user has to read the rule to include them.
Phase 5 (description tuning) — per the plan, this is gated on evals re-running. Now that they have, run the skill-creator description-optimization loop with a 20-query trigger eval set.
Variance — when running in a session with subagents available, run each of the 10 cases 3× and report mean / variance. Mental dry-run is deterministic and doesn't reveal flakiness.
